title: Physician Referrals * Transgender Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physician Referrals * Transgender Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF TRANSPONDER RESOURCE NAVIGATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral resources including healthcare, insurance, social services, housing, and mental health. Offers an online directory of trans-inclusive local resources, covering everything from healthcare and bodywork to faith services and crisis support. Assists with name/gender legal document change through the courts or at the DMV, with services ranging from providing information about changing documents in Oregon to offering financial aid for document fees. The level of financial assistance and eligibility for this assistance varies based on the program's budget. The message line is staffed by volunteers and it may take a few days for calls to be returned. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Individuals who are transgender or gender-diverse Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 321-0872 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSPONDER RESOURCE NAVIGATOR
